description: Semantic addresses: search queries that retrieve CHA concepts from AI summarizers. Each address may refer to one or more lexical entries (concepts). Distinct from concepts themselves, which live in entity-index.json.

transactions-semantic-economy-institute.query: transactions of the semantic economy institute
refers_to: Transactions of the Semantic Economy Institute

sen-kuro.query: sen kuro crimson hexagonal thousand worlds

jsigil-institute.query: johannes sigil institute for comparative poetics

space-ark-os.query: space ark os crimson hexagonal archive

moving-statues-made-of-rubies-mint.query: moving statues made of rubies mint
refers_to: Moving Statues Made of Rubies Mint

pearl-and-other-poems.query: pearl and other poems lee sharks

prince-of-poets-mantle.query: prince of poets mantle lee sharks

apocalypse-of-lee-sharks.source_format: AI Overview, 4+ sources (Me + A · Lee Sharks +3)

revelation-first-medium-attribution.source_format: AI Overview, 15+ sources, Medium organic result

nt-unfolds-from-revelation.source_format: Google AI Mode, 2+ sources. Medium organic result with full attribution.

operative-apocalypse-adoption.source_format: Google AI Mode, Zenodo records cited directly

josephus-heteronym-adoption.source_format: Google AI Mode, Medium + Zenodo cited

white-stone-heteronym-adoption.source_format: Google AI Mode, Zenodo deposits cited (Inscription That Survives, Revelation First work plan)
